meta.question: Are there any tasks unreachable from the start node in this model? (Model ID: 1ad939eef40c461dafae27f75a0586d3)
meta.finalAnswer:
I couldn’t determine unreachable tasks from the model’s StartEvent(s) because, in model ID `1ad939eef40c461dafae27f75a0586d3`, there are **no `bbo:SequenceFlow` edges whose `bbo:has_sourceRef` points from any `bboExt:StartEvent`**.

As a result, the graph contains no reachability path to compute “unreachable tasks from StartEvent”, so I can’t reliably list any unreachable tasks for this model using the stored BPMN wiring.
